data.title: Tesla's Red Hot Stock Meets Meme Magic $420 Level, Musk Celebrates 'The Prophecy' — Analysts React
data.description: Tesla's stock hit the symbolic $420 level, prompting celebratory reactions from Elon Musk and investors, marking a milestone in its impressive year-to-date performance fueled by innovation, strong sales, and market optimism.

data.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Bags $10M In Ethereum: What's Going On?
data.description: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency project backed by President-elect Donald Trump, purchased Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) worth $10 million on Wednesday.

data.title: BMW Takes Down Appreciation For Tesla FSD, Dashing Hopes Of A Licensing Deal With The EV Giant: Elon Musk Says 'Too Bad'
data.description: German automaker BMW on Wednesday took down its appreciation for Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) driver assistance system without an explanation, merely hours after posting it on X.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Trims Tesla Exposure Amid Searing Rally, Sells $21.8M Worth Of Stock — Bets On This AI Medical Company
data.description: On Wednesday Dec. 11, 2024, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest sold $21.8 million worth of Tesla shares.

data.title: Jim Cramer Bullish On Netflix Nearing $1,000 And AMD's 'Cheap' Valuation Despite Nvidia Dominance
data.description: Jim Cramer expressed strong buying conviction for Netflix Inc. during Wednesday's Lightning Round on "Mad Money," as the streaming giant's shares traded near $934 amid broader tech market strength.
